subcodes.first_line: O dearly beloved friend! Thy letter was received and its contents became known. My hope is in the grace of the loving Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار عزیز نامه شما رسید و مضامین معلوم گردید امید از لطف خداوند مهربان
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @service to others; to the Cause of God
